one_time_description: Corrections aux exercices antérieurs liées à l'analyse des états financiers des années antérieures des différents bailleurs de fonds, réduisant le surplus accumulé de 694 231 $
economic_notes: 6 government business enterprises accounted for by modified equity method: Société en commandite Scierie Opitciwan (55%), Société en commandite Services Forestiers Opitciwan (99.99%), Société en commandite Épicerie Opitciwonok (99.99%), Développement Économique Opitciwan inc. (100%), Société en commandite Station Services Opitciwan (99.99%), Société en commandite Opitciwan Télécom (99.99%). Combined equity value of $18,134,025.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2021. Financial statements are combined (Fonds d'exploitation and Fonds d'habitation). Six GBEs accounted for by modified equity method. Prior year comparatives were restated due to corrections to prior periods totaling $694,231 and an adjustment to capital assets and long-term debt of $192,530. A reserve for drinking water and wastewater of $2,736,452 was established during the year. Negative 'Autres' revenue line of -$5,101,763 reflects adjustments. Current liabilities calculated as accounts payable $6,280,791 plus deferred revenue $7,565,135 (excluding long-term debt and SAC/Health Canada unused funds shown separately). Total government transfers calculated as SAC $64,160,073 + CMHC $3,259,261 + Federal Other $6,854,189 + Provincial $4,639,761 = $74,913,284. OSR = $81,230,523 - $74,913,284 = $6,317,239 (includes GBE equity income and band fund revenues and other). Remuneration schedule not included in provided text.
